parameters.content:
## eBook Ingestion Overall steps:
1. Download the book
2. Convert the PDF to HTML (IDR)
2.1
3. Generate Thumbs (Acrobat 300px)
4. Extract the compressed file.
6. Cleanup 
6.1 Delete files:
- search
- index
- config
- annotations
- thumbnails

1-many folder is the asset folder
1-many HTML is the HTML page
Font

B. Book to thumbnails 
- All pages image extraction (300px per page)
- All extracted images naming - From ascending order 1-All [000-000] (All)

HTML, 1-many asset folder renaming (000-000)

C. Classification
- How to extract Chapter information from the PDF?
- Create Chapter folder - Eg. Chapter 1 Basic of Sciences (1-25) Maybe Extract from Sheets?
- Page 1-25 asset folder, HTML, Thumbnails & Font folder.

D. Preprocessing the book

E. Content upload (Seeding) After filling in the details

F. Asset upload using book ID from publishing.

G. Cleanup at publishing after assets have been uploaded.
- Update chapter name
- Skip page number
- Update page numbers according to the book
- First chapter feature by looking at the book/ page numbers at the footer (Left right alignment)
- Cover page upload (600px)
- QC from publishing 

H. Pull book to BO and link to platform. Update sheet!

## Starting steps:
1. Download the book
2. Convert the PDF to HTML (IDR)
2.1
3. Generate Thumbs (Acrobat 300px)
4. Extract the compressed file.
6. Cleanup 
6.1 Delete files:
- search
- index
- config
- annotations
- thumbnails

1-many folder is the asset folder
1-many HTML is the HTML page
Font

B. Book to thumbnails 
- All pages image extraction (300px per page)
- All extracted images naming - From ascending order 1-All [000-000] (All)

HTML, 1-many asset folder renaming (000-000)

C. Classification
- How to extract Chapter information from the PDF?
- Create Chapter folder - Eg. Chapter 1 Basic of Sciences (1-25) Maybe Extract from Sheets?
- Page 1-25 asset folder, HTML, Thumbnails & Font folder.

parameters.command:
=# 1. Setup paths
BASE_DIR="/data/output"
ARCHIVE_DIR="$BASE_DIR/archive"
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M)

mkdir -p "$ARCHIVE_DIR" 2>/dev/null

# 2. Find newest zip
if [ ! -d "$BASE_DIR" ]; then echo "{\"error\": \"Base directory $BASE_DIR not found\"}"; exit 1; fi
cd "$BASE_DIR" || exit 1

LATEST_ZIP=$(ls -t *.zip 2>/dev/null | head -1)

if [ -z "$LATEST_ZIP" ]; then
  echo "{\"error\": \"No zip file found in $BASE_DIR. Please ensure the book zip is uploaded.\"}"
  exit 1
fi

FOLDER_NAME="${LATEST_ZIP%.*}"
CLEAN_NAME=$(echo "$FOLDER_NAME" | sed 's/_/ /g' | xargs)
TARGET_DIR="$BASE_DIR/$FOLDER_NAME"

# 3. Prevent collisions
if [ -d "$TARGET_DIR" ]; then
  TARGET_DIR="${TARGET_DIR}_$TIMESTAMP"
fi
mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR"

# 4. Unzip
if ! unzip -qo "$LATEST_ZIP" -d "$TARGET_DIR"; then
  echo "{\"error\": \"Failed to unzip $LATEST_ZIP. File might be corrupted.\"}"
  exit 1
fi

# 5. Cleanup and Rename
cd "$TARGET_DIR" || exit 1
rm -rf search* index* config* annotations* thumbnails* 2>/dev/null

# Rename numeric folders/files (e.g., 001 -> 1)
for f in [0-9]*; do
  [ -e "$f" ] || continue
  if [ -d "$f" ]; then
    new_d=$(echo "$f" | sed 's/^0*//')
    [ -z "$new_d" ] && new_d="0"
    [ "$f" != "$new_d" ] && mv "$f" "$new_d" 2>/dev/null
  fi
  case "$f" in
    *.html)
      base=$(echo "$f" | sed 's/\.html$//')
      new_b=$(echo "$base" | sed 's/^0*//')
      [ -z "$new_b" ] && new_b="0"
      [ "$base" != "$new_b" ] && mv "$f" "$new_b.html" 2>/dev/null
      ;;
  esac
done

# 6. Handle PDF (Move to central PDF folder)
PDF_MATCH="$BASE_DIR/$FOLDER_NAME.pdf"
[ ! -f "$PDF_MATCH" ] && PDF_MATCH="$BASE_DIR/$FOLDER_NAME.PDF"
PDF_OUTPUT="$BASE_DIR/PDFs"
mkdir -p "$PDF_OUTPUT"

FINAL_PDF_PATH=""
if [ -f "$PDF_MATCH" ]; then
  mv "$PDF_MATCH" "$PDF_OUTPUT/"
  FINAL_PDF_PATH="$PDF_OUTPUT/$(basename "$PDF_MATCH")"
fi

# 7. Archive Zip
mv "$BASE_DIR/$LATEST_ZIP" "$ARCHIVE_DIR/" 2>/dev/null

# 8. Return JSON
printf '{"folderName":"%s", "cleanFolderName":"%s", "targetDir":"%s", "pdfPath":"%s"}' "$FOLDER_NAME" "$CLEAN_NAME" "$TARGET_DIR" "$FINAL_PDF_PATH"

=# 1. Grab directory & PDF path
TARGET_DIR="{{ JSON.parse($node["Execute Command1"].json.stdout).targetDir }}"
PDF_FILE="{{ JSON.parse($node["Execute Command1"].json.stdout).pdfPath }}"

# 2. Fallback if PDF path is missing
if [ ! -f "$PDF_FILE" ]; then
  PDF_FILE=$(find "$TARGET_DIR" -maxdepth 1 -name "*.pdf" -o -name "*.PDF" | head -1)
fi

if [ -z "$PDF_FILE" ] || [ ! -f "$PDF_FILE" ]; then
  echo "{\"status\": \"error\", \"msg\": \"No PDF found for extraction in $TARGET_DIR or central folder.\"}"
  exit 1
fi

# 3. Extract using mutool exclusively
if mutool draw -r 72 -o "$TARGET_DIR/%d.jpg" "$PDF_FILE"; then
  echo "{\"status\": \"success\", \"msg\": \"Thumbnails generated via mutool\"}"
else
  echo "{\"status\": \"error\", \"msg\": \"mutool failed to extract thumbnails. Check if mutool is installed in the container.\"}"
  exit 1
fi

=# 1. Variables
T_DIR="{{ JSON.parse($node["Execute Command1"].json.stdout).targetDir }}"
RAW_TITLE="{{ $json["ChapterTitle"] }}"
START="{{ $json["StartPage"] }}"
END="{{ $json["EndPage"] }}"

# 1.1 Sanitize Title
TITLE=$(echo "$RAW_TITLE" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _-]//g' | xargs)

# Log attempt to a persistent log file in the book dir
LOG_FILE="$T_DIR/classification_log.txt"
date >> "$LOG_FILE"
echo "Processing Chapter: '$RAW_TITLE' -> '$TITLE' (Pages $START to $END)" >> "$LOG_FILE"

# Clean inputs
START=$(echo "$START" | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1)
END=$(echo "$END" | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1)

if [ -z "$TITLE" ] || [ -z "$START" ] || [ -z "$END" ]; then
  echo "Error: Missing data for $RAW_TITLE (Start: $START, End: $END)" >> "$LOG_FILE"
  exit 0
fi

BOOK_PATH="$T_DIR"
CHAPTER_PATH="$BOOK_PATH/$TITLE"

# 2. Create Chapter Folder
mkdir -p "$CHAPTER_PATH"

# 3. Move unique assets (HTML, JPG, Asset Folders)
MOVED_COUNT=0
for i in $(seq "$START" "$END"); do
  [ -f "$BOOK_PATH/$i.html" ] && mv "$BOOK_PATH/$i.html" "$CHAPTER_PATH/" && MOVED_COUNT=$((MOVED_COUNT+1))
  [ -f "$BOOK_PATH/$i.jpg" ] && mv "$BOOK_PATH/$i.jpg" "$CHAPTER_PATH/"
  [ -d "$BOOK_PATH/$i" ] && mv "$BOOK_PATH/$i" "$CHAPTER_PATH/"
done

echo "Successfully moved $MOVED_COUNT items for $TITLE" >> "$LOG_FILE"
echo "{\"status\": \"success\", \"chapter\": \"$TITLE\", \"moved\": $MOVED_COUNT}"
